prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-8-PIN-PUNCH-ST1032B-BUN-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 8pc Brass Pin Punch Set for Metal Crafting Hobby Tools in Assorted Sizes Description: The ToolTreaux brass pin punch set comes with 8 different-sized tips that are great tools for accurately and precisley punching holes out of wood for woodworking, crafting and home improvement projects. These are also the types of punches used in gunsmithing.

All of the punches included are made of solid brass which is softer than other metal punching tools and will not mar metal surfaces like similar stainless steel punches meant for hardened steel. Do not use brass punches on heavy-duty materials.

Our set comes with 8 assorted diameter sizes for differing levels of precision when working with your materials: 1/16”, 3/32”, 1/8“, 5/32”, 3/16”, 7/32”, 1/4“ and 5/16”. Each punch measures about 3.81” or 96mm in length.

To store and organize your brass bunch set when not in use, we’ve include a convenient carrying pouch to keep them safe when not in use. The entire set including the pouch will easily fit inside most tool boxes, tool belt pockets and storage crafting organizers. Make sure to grab a set of these punches before your next woodworking or gunsmithing project. Search Terms: brass punches punch set woodworking tools woodworking gunsmithing tools awls awl tools home improvement items tools and home improvement wood working tools and equipment wood working wood working tools wood working gifts men crafting supplies Features: - PRECISION PUNCH TOOL SET: ToolTreaux brass pin punches are great for accurately and precisely punching materials out of sheet metal, aluminum, ideal for crafting and home improvement projects including woodworking - SOLID BRASS TOOL PUNCHES: All punches included are made of solid brass which is softer than other metal punching tools and will not mar metal surfaces like similar stainless steel punches. Do not use brass punches on heavy-duty materials - ASSORTED PUNCH SIZES: Set of 8 brass punches included assorted sizes for differing levels of precision when working with your materials: 1/16”, 3/32”, 1/8“, 5/32”, 3/16”, 7/32”, 1/4“ and 5/16”; Each punch measures 4” (96mm) - STORAGE POUCH INCLUDED: Brass punch set come with convenient PVC carrying pouch to store and organize your tools when not in use. Entire set easily fits inside most tool belt pockets, tool boxes and storage crafting organizers - SPECIFICATIONS: Materials: brass, PVC, Number of punches: 8; Punch diameter sizes: 1/16”, 3/32”, 1/8“, 5/32”, 3/16”, 7/32”, 1/4“ and 5/16”; Punch length: 3.81” (96mm); Weight of set: .56lbs (8.96oz) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 8pc Brass Pin Punch Set Assorted Sizes

anthropic.title_differentiation: Solid Brass, 8 Precision Sizes, Non-Marring, Includes Storage Pouch, Woodworking And Gunsmithing

openai.title_differentiation: Solid Brass, 8 Sizes, 116" To 516", Won't Mar Metal, PVC Pouch, Woodworking, Gunsmithing, 4" Length, Compact Storage
